title: 5 ‘Strong Buy' Stocks With Dividend Hikes Expected This Week
text: After years of a low interest rate environment, many investors have turned to equities, not only for the growth potential but also for solid and dependable dividends that help to provide an income stream.

title: 4 ‘Strong Buy' Dividend-Paying Defense Stocks to Grab Now With War in Ukraine Looming
text: The situation has become dicier every day, and while the invasion of Ukraine by the Russian Army has not started yet, some 130,000 troops are massed near the border.

title: Discover Financial Services And 3 Other Stocks Sold By Insiders
text: European stocks dropped sharply on Monday, extending last week's selloff. Investors, meanwhile, focused on some notable insider trades.
